strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling) plus a history of public talks and workshops
concerns: No principal/director-level scope — career has been senior/staff IC delivery roles, not organization-wide technical strategy or influence
AI experience is recent (~1 year) and tooling-focused; no recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products at scale, or ML depth
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and limited evidence of advising executives or strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Seniority/scope gap vs director-level IC role
Long tenure, breadth, and founder experience

response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience minimum and shows genuine breadth, craftsmanship, and entrepreneurial initiative, with a recent pivot toward AI-agent tooling. However, this role is a director-level strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the ability to advise strategic customers and shape cloud/AI direction — areas where the resume shows only early, tactical exposure. The profile fits a strong senior/staff engineer, not a principal AI strategist.
